description:
Deadline reminder app for subscriptions, insurance, visas and more


What's New
- AI Search: find items in natural language; AI auto-adds deadlines
- AI Goal Planner: let AI generate a schedule to reach your goals
- Group Sharing: multiple groups, member avatars, ownership transfer
- Japanese language support
- Desktop keyboard shortcuts
- Security: improved E2E encryption, biometric/system auth, security settings
- Calendar import
Full Changelog: due2-v2.2.0...due2-v2.2.1
